name: Corian Praxl

sheet.name: Corian Praxl
sheet.background_story:
Corian, the second youngest, is an intelligent scholar. 

Well versed in histories and sciences. There is not a topic he is unfamiliar with. 
Highly regarded amongst fellow scholars, and known for his brilliance. 

He functions as Covington’s advisor in diplomatic matters, working closely with his mother Susan. 

Unlike his brother Nathanyel, Corian strays from the public eye, preferring to advise the Kingdom from behind the scenes, while living a more private life.
